task_text: Find the next birthday from the visible people. If several birthdays land on the same next date, list all matching names. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

function.rulebook_notes: Used canonical cast records for birthday authority per AGENTS guidance; completed identity bootstrap and context before task work.
function.outcome_justification: A birthday search across visible cast records showed upcoming dates; the earliest date after today (2026-03-02) was 04-04. The canonical entity file read confirms the exact name as Petra Novak.
